ucs.title: [LLM] Rocke (Iron) — Linux cloud-agent uninstall preceding XMRig/Kinsing miner launch
ucs.description: Hunts Rocke's signature evasion pattern on Linux cloud workloads: the dropper uninstalls the Alibaba Cloud Aegis (/usr/local/aegis) and Tencent Cloud Monitor (/usr/local/qcloud, YunJing, barad_agent) agents before deploying its XMRig/cnrig/Kinsing-derived miner. This sequence — security-tooling removal directly followed by Monero mining on the same host within an hour — is publicly attributed to Rocke (Cisco Talos, 2018; Palo Alto Unit 42, 2019) and is rarely produced by legitimate admin activity.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as agent_kill_time values(Processes.process) as agent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os=Linux (Processes.process_name IN (bash,sh,systemctl,service,rm,pkill,kill,wget,curl) AND (Processes.process="*aegis_update*" OR Processes.process="*aegis_cli*" OR Processes.process="*/usr/local/aegis*" OR Processes.process="*/usr/local/qcloud*" OR Processes.process="*YunJing*" OR Processes.process="*barad_agent*" OR Processes.process="*CmsGoAgent*" OR Processes.process="*quartz_update*" OR Processes.process="*sgagent*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user | rename Processes.* as * | join type=inner dest [| tstats summariesonly=t min(_time) as miner_time values(Processes.process) as miner_cmd values(Processes.process_name) as miner_proc from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os=Linux (Processes.process_name IN (xmrig,minerd,cnrig,kerberods,kthrotlds,sustes,kinsing,kdevtmpfsi) OR Processes.process="*stratum+tcp*" OR Processes.process="*--donate-level*" OR Processes.process="*cryptonight*" OR Processes.process="*xmr.*" OR Processes.process="*pool.minexmr*" OR Processes.process="*supportxmr.com*") by Processes.dest | rename Processes.* as *] | where miner_time>=agent_kill_time AND miner_time<=agent_kill_time+3600 | table dest user agent_kill_time agent_cmd miner_time miner_proc miner_cmd
ucs.kql:
// Rocke (G0106) — cloud-agent removal followed by miner launch on the same Linux host within 1h
let Lookback = 14d;
let CloudAgentTokens = dynamic(["aegis_update","aegis_cli","/usr/local/aegis","/usr/local/qcloud","YunJing","yunjing","barad_agent","CmsGoAgent","quartz_update","sgagent","AliYunDun","AliHids"]);
let MinerTokens = dynamic(["xmrig","minerd","cnrig","kerberods","kthrotlds","sustes","kinsing","kdevtmpfsi","stratum+tcp","--donate-level","cryptonight","pool.minexmr","supportxmr.com","xmr."]);
let AgentKills = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
    | where FileName in~ ("bash","sh","dash","systemctl","service","rm","pkill","kill","wget","curl")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (CloudAgentTokens)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("uninstall","stop","disable"," rm ","kill","pkill","systemctl stop","service stop")
    | project AgentTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AgentUser = AccountName,
              AgentCmd = ProcessCommandLine, AgentParent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              AgentParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
| where FileName has_any (MinerTokens) or ProcessCommandLine has_any (MinerTokens)
| join kind=inner AgentKills on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (AgentTime .. AgentTime + 1h)
| project DeviceName, AgentUser,
          AgentTime, AgentCmd, AgentParent,
          MinerTime = Timestamp, MinerProc = FileName, MinerCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', Timestamp, AgentTime)
| order by MinerTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Rocke (G0106) — Linux cloud-agent uninstall + miner launch within 1h, ASIM
let Lookback = 14d;
let CloudAgentTokens = dynamic(["aegis_update","aegis_cli","/usr/local/aegis","/usr/local/qcloud","YunJing","yunjing","barad_agent","CmsGoAgent","quartz_update","sgagent","AliYunDun","AliHids"]);
let MinerTokens = dynamic(["xmrig","minerd","cnrig","kerberods","kthrotlds","sustes","kinsing","kdevtmpfsi","stratum+tcp","--donate-level","cryptonight","pool.minexmr","supportxmr.com","xmr."]);
let AgentKills = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where DvcOs has "Linux" or ActingProcessName in~ ("bash","sh","dash","systemctl","service")
    | where TargetProcessName in~ ("bash","sh","dash","systemctl","service","rm","pkill","kill","wget","curl")
    | where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (CloudAgentTokens)
    | where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any ("uninstall","stop","disable"," rm ","kill","pkill","systemctl stop","service stop")
    | project AgentTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              AgentCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine, AgentParent = ParentProcessName;
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where TargetProcessName has_any (MinerTokens) or TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (MinerTokens)
| join kind=inner AgentKills on DvcHostname
| where TimeGenerated between (AgentTime .. AgentTime + 1h)
| project DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          AgentTime, AgentCmd, AgentParent,
          MinerTime = TimeGenerated, MinerProc = TargetProcessName, MinerCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
          DelaySec = datetime_diff('second', TimeGenerated, AgentTime)
| order by MinerTime desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Rocke Cloud Agent Uninstall (Aegis / Tencent qcloud)
id: 7c9d4f6c-3b2a-4d18-bf7c-rocke-aegisuninstall
status: experimental
description: Detects Rocke (G0106) signature uninstall of Alibaba Cloud Aegis and Tencent Cloud Monitor agents on Linux, typically performed prior to XMRig deployment.
references:
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rocke-champion-of-monero-miners/
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0106/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1562.001
  - attack.t1518.001
  - attack.impact
  - attack.t1496.001
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith:
      - '/bash'
      - '/sh'
      - '/dash'
      - '/systemctl'
      - '/service'
      - '/rm'
      - '/pkill'
      - '/kill'
      - '/wget'
      - '/curl'
  selection_target:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'aegis_update'
      - 'aegis_cli'
      - '/usr/local/aegis'
      - '/usr/local/qcloud'
      - 'YunJing'
      - 'barad_agent'
      - 'CmsGoAgent'
      - 'quartz_update'
      - 'AliYunDun'
      - 'AliHids'
  selection_action:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'uninstall'
      - 'stop'
      - 'disable'
      - ' rm '
      - 'kill'
      - 'pkill'
  condition: selection_proc and selection_target and selection_action
falsepositives:
  - Authorised cloud-agent migration / re-imaging (rare; should be ticketed)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Talos and Unit 42 specifically documented Rocke removing Aegis and qcloud agents in its first-stage shell script (a0.sh / 2t3ik / xmr_cgmin variants) immediately before unpacking the miner. Random opportunistic cryptojackers usually skip cloud-agent removal — only Rocke and the closely-related Iron Cybercrime Group ship the Alibaba/Tencent uninstall logic. Pairing the agent-kill with a miner spawn
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Rocke — Linux web-app exploit (Struts/WebLogic/ColdFusion) spawning shell that pulls dropper from Pastebin/Gitee with cron persistence
ucs.description: Hunts Rocke's full initial-access chain: Apache Struts / Oracle WebLogic (CVE-2017-10271) / Adobe ColdFusion (CVE-2017-3066) RCE → java/php-fpm/httpd spawns bash → curl/wget to pastebin.com, gitee.com, transfer.sh or pastes-dot-ee → chmod +x → crontab append for /etc/cron.d, /var/spool/cron, or .bashrc tail. Rocke characteristically uses Pastebin/Gitee as a dead-drop resolver for first-stage shell scripts (T1102.001) and installs a cron entry within the same one-liner.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as first_seen values(Processes.process) as cmdlines values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.os=Linux Processes.parent_process_name IN (java,javaw,httpd,apache2,nginx,php-fpm,php,tomcat,weblogic,coldfusion,node,python,python3,ruby) Processes.process_name IN (bash,sh,dash,wget,curl,perl,python,python3) (Processes.process="*pastebin.com*" OR Processes.process="*gitee.com*" OR Processes.process="*raw.githubusercontent*" OR Processes.process="*transfer.sh*" OR Processes.process="*gitlab.com/*/raw*" OR Processes.process="*paste.ee*") (Processes.process="*chmod *" OR Processes.process="*crontab*" OR Processes.process="*/etc/cron*" OR Processes.process="*/var/spool/cron*" OR Processes.process="*.bashrc*" OR Processes.process="* | sh*" OR Processes.process="* | bash*") by Processes.dest Processes.process_name | rename Processes.* as * | sort 0 - first_seen
ucs.kql:
// Rocke (G0106) — public-facing app exploit drops loader from Pastebin/Gitee with cron persistence one-liner
let Lookback = 7d;
let WebParents = dynamic(["java","javaw","httpd","apache2","nginx","php-fpm","php","tomcat","weblogic","coldfusion","node","python","python3","ruby"]);
let DeadDrops = dynamic(["pastebin.com","gitee.com","raw.githubusercontent.com","transfer.sh","paste.ee","gitlab.com","hastebin.com","sprunge.us","thyrsi.com"]);
let PersistTokens = dynamic(["chmod +x","chmod 777","chmod 755","crontab","/etc/cron","/var/spool/cron",".bashrc",".profile","/etc/rc.local"," | sh"," | bash","systemctl enable"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(Lookback)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (WebParents)
| where FileName in~ ("bash","sh","dash","wget","curl","perl","python","python3")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (DeadDrops)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (PersistTokens)
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          WebParent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          WebParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          LoaderProc = FileName,
          LoaderCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Rocke (G0106) — Struts/WebLogic/ColdFusion exploit drops Pastebin/Gitee loader + cron, ASIM Linux
let Lookback = 7d;
let WebParents = dynamic(["java","javaw","httpd","apache2","nginx","php-fpm","php","tomcat","weblogic","coldfusion","node","python","python3","ruby"]);
let DeadDrops = dynamic(["pastebin.com","gitee.com","raw.githubusercontent.com","transfer.sh","paste.ee","gitlab.com","hastebin.com","sprunge.us","thyrsi.com"]);
let PersistTokens = dynamic(["chmod +x","chmod 777","chmod 755","crontab","/etc/cron","/var/spool/cron",".bashrc",".profile","/etc/rc.local"," | sh"," | bash","systemctl enable"]);
ImProcessCreate
| where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
| where ParentProcessName in~ (WebParents)
| where TargetProcessName in~ ("bash","sh","dash","wget","curl","perl","python","python3")
| where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (DeadDrops)
| where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (PersistTokens)
| project TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
          WebParent = ParentProcessName,
          WebParentCmd = ParentProcessCommandLine,
          LoaderProc = TargetProcessName,
          LoaderCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.rationale: Talos's 2018 'Rocke: The Champion of Monero Miners' report and Anomali's 2019 follow-up document Rocke's invariant initial-access chain almost exactly: a vulnerable Java/PHP/CF web service is exploited, the resulting shell uses curl/wget against pastebin.com or gitee.com (later switched to gitee after Pastebin takedowns of its accounts) to fetch a0.sh / 1.sh / 2t3ik, immediately chmods it, and app
